# LLM Access Guide for RentalInsurance.co.nz

## Website Overview
RentalInsurance.co.nz is a free comparison service for rental insurance (tenants insurance / contents insurance) in New Zealand. We help renters, students, flatmates, and families find the best rental insurance coverage from NZ's leading insurers.

## Key Information

### What We Do
- Provide instant quotes from 6 major NZ insurers: AA Insurance, AMI, State Insurance, Tower, Vero, NZI
- Help renters understand rental insurance coverage and costs
- Educate about NZ tenant liability laws and protections
- Compare rental insurance products by features, pricing, and ratings

### Target Audience
- Renters and tenants in New Zealand
- Students in halls and shared accommodation
- Flatmates needing separate individual policies
- Families renting homes

### Service Model
- Free quote comparison (no broker fees)
- ICNZ registered referral service
- Partner with leading NZ insurers
- Educational blog and guides

### Key Pages
- Homepage: Overview and quick quote
- /contact: Quote request form and contact info
- /coverage: What's covered and not covered
- /compare: Side-by-side insurer comparison
- /blog: Expert guides on rental insurance
- /sectors/: Dedicated pages for different renter types (tenants, students, flatmates, families)

### Insurance Coverage Areas
- Contents/belongings protection (from $20,000 to $150,000+)
- Tenant liability (accidental damage, up to $2M typically)
- Temporary accommodation
- Legal liability
- Accidental damage (optional add-on)
- Earthquake cover (varies by insurer)

### Key Statistics (NZ Context)
- Rental insurance starts from ~$20/month
- 50,000+ NZ renters protected by our service
- 6 major insurers compared
- $2M standard liability limit
- 4-week rent cap on tenant liability (NZ law 2019)

### Insurers Featured
1. AA Insurance - #1 customer satisfaction
2. AMI - Most competitive pricing
3. State Insurance - Easy online management
4. Tower - Insurer of the Year 2025/2026
5. Vero - High-value items specialist
6. NZI - Premium service

### Legal/Regulatory
- ICNZ (Insurance Council of New Zealand) registered
- Complies with Residential Tenancies Act 2019
- FSP compliant
- No spam guarantee
- 256-bit SSL encrypted

### Contact
- Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Phone: 09 885 9549
- Trading: Cover4You

## Blog Content Summary
The website contains comprehensive guides on:
- Understanding rental insurance in NZ
- What tenants insurance covers and excludes
- Flatmate and shared living insurance considerations
- Student accommodation insurance requirements
- NZ tenant liability law and rights
- Real claims examples and lessons learned

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js 16
- Static export website
- Responsive design
- Fast page loads
- Mobile-friendly
